raw_input:
Hi Anders, 
 
I hope you’re very well indeed – a happy new year to you.
 
My apologies for the delay in my reply – entirely my fault; I am reviewing my mailbox for any items that I have missed and I can see that I have not responded to you.
 
Can you please advise if this requirement is still live? If so, in order to optimise the process, can you advise:
 
•	Is there a target price we need to reach? 
•	Will you take care of collection/shipping? How do you need the glass packaged?
•	Whilst you’ve advised circa 5mm thickness, the product is competitively produced in 6mm thickness; would this be suitable?
 
I look forward to hearing from you.
 
Many thanks 
 
Kind Regards,
ai_summary: svar på email om glaspris og specifikationer
ai_context: når du tjekker emails på arbejde

Behandl listen herunder som separate captures, én linje = ét item.

Regler:
- opret dem som normale APAI-items
- behold dem som individuelle items, ikke én stor note
- AI-klassificér hver linje
- markér mulige dubletter
- foreslå sammenlægning hvor det giver mening
- vis tydeligt hvis et item ligner noget fra Todoist eller eksisterende APAI-items
- vær konservativ: hellere markere dublet-kandidater end at merge automatisk
